title: talah #8518
definition:
1) to hang
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to hang
             1a1a) to hang up (any object)
             1a1b)  to put to death by hanging
    1b) (Niphal) to be hanged
    1c) (Piel) to hang, hang up (for display)
